text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Ahhhh, ouch ouch ow ow OW! I've<n>really done it
this time...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
You don't think me injuring myself is<n>going to
lower everyone else's<n>morale, do you?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: What if it makes everyone afraid totrain?! What... have I done?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I know! I just need to take a quick<n>march
through the academy!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
It might be painful and difficult... but if I<n>put on a
brave face, it'll put everyone<n>at ease!
choice_data_list:
There's nothing to worry about, so just get some
rest.
If you're only walking, I guess it's okay.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
But! But! What about the<n>Umamusume who might
be feeling<n>uneasy because of me...
choice_data_list: They'll definitely see through your act.
They'll definitely see through your act.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Ugh, you're right. If they notice me<n>struggling, it'll
just make things<n>worse.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Uuuuugh, this suuucks... When<n>pushed to the limit
and her mobility's<n>taken away, what does a simp
have<n>left?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Drum roll, please! All that's left is<n>love... But, ugh...
I wish that love could<n>help me walk...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: I make Agnes Digital rest and try to<n>cheer her up.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: All right! Let's hurry up and go<n>already!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Owwww!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Huff, wheeze... Get a hold ofyourself, Digitan. Picture your oshis.Banish all other thoughts from yourmind and the pain will change intoglory...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Sure enough, trying to force herself to<n>move was a
bad idea. Her recovery<n>is delayed as a result.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Okay, fake it until you make it! I feel<n>great! The
picture of health! Take a<n>good look, beloved Umas!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Wait a sec... I feel like I actually dofeel better now that I've walked abit...

text_block_list.name: Digital's Classmate
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Digital! You're already up and<n>walking
around? What a relief! I'm so<n>happy for you!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
O-o-o-of cooourse! As you can see,<n>there's
absolutely nothing to worry<n>about!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: ...Yes! I was able to protect their<n>precious smiles.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Actually, I feel much better after<n>seeing her smiling
face! Umas really<n>do make the best medicine! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
With some light exercise, and maybe<n>thanks to the
smile of one of her<n>oshis, Agnes Digital makes a
quick<n>recovery.
